Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Action For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar Mar-03-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Mariah Robinson (415.685.6214; flybytharye@gmail.com) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Akhila Ganapathy, Esq. (925.225.6838; Akhila.ganapathy@statefarm.com)of Jeanette N. Little & Associates for Defendant.

DISCUSSED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LUCAS YEH'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Action For Delay In Prosecution.

Lucas Yeh's "motion to dismiss plaintiff's action for delay in prosecution" is denied without prejudice. CCP 583.410 and 583.420 are discretionary and California courts favor resolution of disputes on their merits.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Action For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar Feb-10-2022 Continued To Mar-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Plaintiff MARIAH ROBINSON (Tel: 415-685-6214) in pro per;
Atty. AKHILA GANAPATHY, Esq. of Jeanette N. Little & Associates (Tel: 925-225-6838) for specially appearing defendant Lucas Yeh.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LUCAS YEH's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Action For Delay In Prosecution.

The Court notes plaintiff did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling.

Matter discussed.

The Court grants plaintiff's request for a continuance of today's hearing.

Plaintiff is to file an opposition to this motion no later than February 17, 2022.

The Court continues this matter for further hearing to March 3, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

The Court informs the plaintiff that if she does not file an opposition by February 17, the Court will grant defendant's motion to dismiss.
